PLAN_STATE: Start from the baseline contributions and identify which component is most likely to yield the largest marginal gain per unit effort. Use one focused subtask to produce a stronger feasible candidate for the hardest-looking component while keeping the other two as fallback targets. If the first subtask yields a clear improvement path, allocate the next effort there; otherwise switch to the component with the cleanest structure. Keep the plan adaptive and stop once additional effort is unlikely to improve total captured headroom materially.
